title: Routing, Selection, Translation, and Redundancy · Operations Brief: Net Subinterfaces
summary: Connect branch, headquarters, cloud, and internet routes while diagnosing asymmetry and failover. Planned artifact: Add and verify the net subinterfaces increment in a routed hybrid branch design. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Use router or firewall subinterfaces with 802.1Q tags and gateway addresses for segmented routing.
Explain FHRP virtual IP and gateway failover behavior, election, state, and host transparency.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.
